text:
Market today: Cautious mood in tech/chips. Concerns about the memory market topping (Micron) and AI financing costs (Amazon debt sell-off) are the main drivers, directly impacting your concentrated book. Geopolitical tensions (Iran strikes) add broader uncertainty.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.06%) is a major concern, being leveraged and significantly down; its stop at 200 is well above current price of 165.28. SPAL (-23.1%), another leveraged ETF, is below its stop of 21.38. QQQI (-2.16%) is near its 52 stop. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on the chip sector for further weakness following Micron's news. Also, monitor the broader sentiment around AI financing and valuations.

Bottom line: Focus on aggressive risk management for your leveraged positions and be ready for potential tech/chip volatility.
plays: SPAL's price (19.34) is below its stop (21.38). Consider exiting this new, leveraged position to prevent further losses.
SOXL, a leveraged chip bull ETF, is down -35%. Review your stop at 200, which is above current price; consider trimming to reduce exposure.
Geopolitical events support a defense play. Consider a new buy in RTX at 200.65-200.45 with a stop at 200.13, per scanner signal.
